robots.message: Live robots.txt was not observed at the conventional URL (HTTP 404).

sitemap.message: Live sitemap.xml was not observed at the conventional URL (HTTP 404).

deployment.message: Deployment status is not checked without local repository evidence.

verdict.summary: One or more live crawl files were not observed.

limitations: Recheck reads public evidence only; it does not deploy or call hosting provider APIs.
Visible crawl files do not guarantee crawling, indexing, propagation, or third-party behavior.
Local repository state is unknown, so deployment status is not checked.
nextActions: Inspect the local repository, make any approved changes, deploy externally, then run a repo-backed recheck.
